sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111017" key="filhth/sios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλ-ητήσιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n111017.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">productive of love</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">friendship,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">φυλακτήριον φ.</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cyran.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">40</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> codd. (fort. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φιλοτήσιον</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
